[{"type":"intro_bold","text":"Water pipeline replacement is taking place in Badnall Street, Borchards"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned water outage on Wednesday 4 February from 09:00 to 16:00 facilitate construction work.","html":"GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned water outage on Wednesday 4 February from 09:00 to 16:00 facilitate construction work."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The following areas will be affected:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Badnall StreetBorchards","html":"
  • Badnall Street
  • Borchards
    • "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the event of any unforeseen circumstances that delay the planned work, the water outage will be rescheduled to a date that will be confirmed, from 09:00 to 16:00.","html":"In the event of any unforeseen circumstances that delay the planned work, the water outage will be rescheduled to a date that will be confirmed, from 09:00 to 16:00."}]
